name: 06-23-split-db-tests
title: 拆分 db/tests.rs — 按 SQL 域拆
description: db/tests.rs 3242 行集成测试按 SQL 域混合。拆出: (1) projects_tests.rs (10 个 project CRUD + migrations), (2) sessions_tests.rs (16 个 session CRUD + worktree + system events), (3) providers_tests.rs (provider/model CRUD), (4) permissions_tests.rs (audit), (5) subagent_runs_tests.rs。与 agent/tests.rs 同理,跨文件并行。
creator: Carlos-home
